'''Chaan''' was a [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Biography==
When [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]] revealed the [[Slayers]] to the [[Elite (Yuuzhan Vong)|Elite]], Chaan was one of the first to denounce them, going so far as to declare them [[Shamed Ones]]. Chaan also asked that proof be given of their fighting abilities, and Shimrra ordered Chaan and ten of his [[Warrior caste|warriors]] to do battle with two of the Slayers. Chaan was displeased with a fight of eleven against two, but the two slayers easily—and literally—carved up Chaan and his warriors. Within seconds, Supreme Commander Chaan and his warriors were [[Death/Legends|dead]]—lying in several pieces in the [[Hall of Confluence]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
